mentions.note: Doesn't have the upside of Vernova or GE Aerospace; not worth owning; prefer Medtronic or Abbott for medical device exposure.
Post-GE split: lacks advantages of GEAEROSPACE and Vernova; commoditized medical devices; prefer Medtronic or Abbott.
3-4% organic growth at 13x earnings; maybe too expensive; medtech valuation compression not yet complete in this name.
